title: Captain America Vs Ironman Movie - Review

enrichment.summary: Kyle reviews Captain America: Civil War, sharing his enjoyment of its ensemble cast and lighthearted battle scenes. He sides with Iron Man on the Sokovia Accords debate, arguing superheroes should be accountable to the government, and criticizes Captain America's refusal as out of character for someone from the 1940s. He also riffs on superhero movies generally, 3D cinema, and why superhero fantasies resonate.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Sides with Iron Man — powered individuals should submit to government control
Finds it out of character for someone from the 1940s who would have obeyed authority
Liked it — creative ensemble, lighthearted tone, good drama without needing world-ending stakes
Prefers Marvel Cinematic Universe for being more lighthearted compared to the heavier X-Men tone
Was excited when 3D first came out but the novelty wore off
